name: Simorgh Repulsion
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>神鳥</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>シムルグ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>排</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>撃</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Discard 1 Winged Beast monster; return all cards in your opponent's Spell & Trap Zones to the hand. You can banish this card from your GY; reveal 1 Winged Beast monster in your hand, and if you do, reduce the Levels of monsters in your hand with that name by 1 for the rest of this turn (even after they are Summoned). You can only activate 1 "Simorgh Repulsion" per turn.
eff: Discard 1 Winged Beast monster; return all cards in your opponent's Spell & Trap Zones to the hand. You can banish this card from your GY; reveal 1 Winged Beast monster in your hand, and if you do, reduce the Levels of monsters in your hand with that name by 1 for the rest of this turn (even after they are Summoned). You can only activate 1 "Simorgh Repulsion" per turn.

action: Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's hand
stat_change: Modifies the Levels of monsters in the hand
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
